Home / Categories / Tech Support Scams

Tech Support Scams

Guides covering fake tech support calls, remote access scams, and malicious software targeting UK users.

Tech Support Scams

Google Voice Scam UK: How Fraudsters Exploit the Service and How to Stay Safe

Google Voice scams exploit the service's free calling and messaging features to conduct identity fraud, account takeovers, and financial crimes while remaining anonymous. This guide explains how the scam works, red flags to watch for, and what to do if you suspect you are targeted.

Updated 2026-04-17

Tech Support Scams

Microsoft Support Scam: How to Protect Yourself in the UK

Scammers impersonate Microsoft support to trick users into providing remote access or payment details. This guide explains the common tactics used in Microsoft support scams, how to spot warning signs, and the steps to take if you've been targeted or compromised.

Updated 2026-04-17

Tech Support Scams

Apple ID Scam Emails: How to Spot and Avoid Them in the UK

Apple ID scam emails are a common threat in the UK. Scammers impersonate Apple to steal your login credentials and personal information. This guide explains how to recognise these phishing attempts, verify legitimate Apple communications, and take action if you've been targeted. Protect your account by understanding the warning signs and knowing when to contact Apple directly.

Updated 2026-04-17

Tech Support Scams

QR Code Payment Scams in the UK: How to Stay Safe

Criminals are exploiting QR codes to redirect payments to fake accounts and compromise personal devices. This guide explains the risks, common tactics, and practical steps UK consumers should take to avoid QR code payment fraud.

Updated 2026-04-17

Beat the Scam

Scam alerts, plain-English checks, and practical guides to help people verify suspicious emails, texts, websites, calls, and offers.
